title: Remove Base Origins
description: Remove Base Origins does what its name implies and removes all of the origins added to the game by the origins mod.
body:
This mod requires the Origins mod to function.

 

Remove Base Origins does what its name implies and removes all of the origins added to the game by the origins mod. 

 

 

Since all mods and data packs are data driven it means that you can still add in other origins mods.

A mod like this may be helpful for creating a more thematic mod pack, or just to get player to try new origins. (all new origins have to be added via other mods)

This mod can be used to make other origin mods feel much more thematic without the interruption of the default origins being in the way. An example of a type of origin mod that would benefit from having this mod installed along side it would be the Enchanted Origins mod.
